title: IAM Specialist - Systems Integrator
description:
Our client is a global technology systems integrator supporting large enterprises with the design and delivery of secure digital identity solutions. The team works closely with organisations to strengthen access controls, governance, and compliance across complex technology environments.

This role suits an experienced Identity & Access Management professional who enjoys hands-on delivery and working across the full project lifecycle.

Responsibilities

  • Deliver end-to-end Digital Identity & Access Management initiatives across enterprise environments

  • Define identity strategies, operating models, and governance frameworks aligned with business and regulatory needs

  • Design secure IAM architectures covering identity governance, privileged access, authentication, and directory services

  • Translate business and risk requirements into practical technical solutions and system designs

  • Build identity governance models covering joiner-mover-leaver processes, access requests, reviews, and role management

  • Configure and customise IAM platforms where standard functionality does not meet requirements

  • Support integration of identity solutions across hybrid and cloud-based environments

  • Assess existing identity environments and recommend improvements, remediation, or enhancements

  • Produce clear technical and operational documentation for stakeholders

  • Resolve platform stability issues, functional gaps, and enhancement requests

  • Contribute to solution design, proposals, and client-facing discussions when required

  • Guide and support junior team members, encouraging consistent delivery standards

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

  • At least 4 + years of hands-on experience delivering Identity & Access Management solutions

  • Practical experience with enterprise IAM platforms such as SailPoint, Saviynt, Microsoft-based identity solutions, Okta, Ping, or similar technologies

  • Understanding of identity governance, access controls, authentication, and audit requirements

  • Experience gathering requirements and working with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

  • Working knowledge of Java, JavaScript, or similar scripting/programming languages

  • Familiarity with databases such as Oracle, IBM, or Microsoft SQL

  • Exposure to Linux and Windows operating systems in enterprise environments

  • Experience writing and running queries in production or controlled environments

    EA: 14S7084 | Registration No: R1981018
